an5.80:1.1: “Monks, these five future dangers, unarisen at present, will arise in the future.
an5.80:1.3: being alert, work to get rid of them.
an5.80:2.2: “There will be, in the course of the future, monks desirous of fine robes.
an5.80:2.3: They, desirous of fine robes, will neglect the practice of wearing cast-off cloth; will neglect isolated forest & wilderness dwellings;
an5.80:2.4: will move to towns, cities, & royal capitals, taking up residence there. For the sake of a robe they will do many kinds of unseemly, inappropriate things.
an5.80:2.5: “This, monks, is the first future danger, unarisen at present, that will arise in the future.
an5.80:2.7: being alert, work to get rid of it.
an5.80:3.1: “And further, in the course of the future there will be monks desirous of fine food.
an5.80:3.2: They, desirous of fine food, will neglect the practice of going for alms; will neglect isolated forest & wilderness dwellings;
an5.80:3.3: will move to towns, cities, & royal capitals, taking up residence there and searching out the tip-top tastes with the tip of the tongue. For the sake of food they will do many kinds of unseemly, inappropriate things.
an5.80:3.4: “This, monks, is the second future danger, unarisen at present, that will arise in the future.
an5.80:3.6: being alert, work to get rid of it.
an5.80:4.1: “And further, in the course of the future there will be monks desirous of fine lodgings.
an5.80:4.2: They, desirous of fine lodgings, will neglect the practice of living in the wilds; will neglect isolated forest & wilderness dwellings;
an5.80:4.3: will move to towns, cities, & royal capitals, taking up residence there. For the sake of lodgings they will do many kinds of unseemly, inappropriate things.
an5.80:4.4: “This, monks, is the third future danger, unarisen at present, that will arise in the future.
an5.80:4.6: being alert, work to get rid of it.
an5.80:5.1: “And further, in the course of the future there will be monks who will live in close association with nuns, female trainees, & female novices.
an5.80:5.2: As they interact with nuns, female trainees, & female novices, they can be expected either
an5.80:5.3: to lead the holy life dissatisfied or to fall into one of the defiling offenses, leaving the training, returning to a lower way of life.
an5.80:5.4: “This, monks, is the fourth future danger, unarisen at present, that will arise in the future.
an5.80:5.6: being alert, work to get rid of it.
an5.80:6.1: “And further, in the course of the future there will be monks who will live in close association with monastery attendants & novices.
an5.80:6.2: As they interact with monastery attendants & novices, they can be expected
an5.80:6.3: to live committed to many kinds of stored-up possessions and to making large boundary posts for fields & crops.
an5.80:6.4: “This, monks, is the fifth future danger, unarisen at present, that will arise in the future.
an5.80:6.6: being alert, work to get rid of it.
an5.80:7.1: “These, monks, are the five future dangers, unarisen at present, that will arise in the future.
an5.80:7.3: being alert, work to get rid of them.”
